subcodes.first_line: O thou who diffusest the fragrances of God! Through the bounties of the Abhá Beauty, I cherish the hope that thou mayest, in the utmost state of attraction, rapture and love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله از الطاف جمال ابهی امیدوارم که در کمال جذب و وله و عشق و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
